summary.intent: Monitor PR #90 (bun version upgrade), respond to review comments, and fix repeated CI failures in the validate-plugin workflow.
summary.outcome: Review comments were replied to and resolved. Two CI fixes were attempted (bun install -g → bunx → bun pm bin -g dynamic path resolution), with the latest fix pushed to the branch.

repo: bun 1.3.12 cannot locate executables via 'bun install -g' or 'bunx' in CI; global binary path must be resolved dynamically via 'bun pm bin -g'
CI fix commits on a version-bump PR are considered incidental and do not warrant PR title/description updates

code.finding: Workflow required two successive fixes: first replacing 'bun install -g' with 'bunx', then replacing 'bunx' with a dynamic path lookup using 'bun pm bin -g' after both prior approaches failed on bun 1.3.12

workflow: Self-triggered review notifications (from the assistant's own reply comments) should be detected and skipped to avoid re-processing
When a CI run ID changes, always fetch fresh logs before attempting a fix

friction: Two consecutive CI approaches (bun install -g, bunx) both failed on bun 1.3.12 before a working solution was found
Noise in PR review monitoring: assistant's own reply comments generated new review-change events that had to be filtered out
open_items: Verify that the 'bun pm bin -g' dynamic path approach actually passes CI — the fix was pushed but the result is not yet confirmed in the transcript
Consider documenting the correct bun global binary invocation pattern in the repo to prevent recurrence on future bun upgrades
